-0.1919*sin(0.2027*exp(0.8164*x_1) - 1.2932*exp(0.4903*x_2) + 2.6226) + 0.1514*sin(-0.0561*sinh(1.6162 - 3.0269*x_2) + 0.2922*tanh(3.9242*x_1 - 4.5234) + 2.9803) - 0.2955
